page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 120.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.5 GB per core. For accelerated workloads, it bundles two NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPUs with a combined total of 32 GB VRAM. Local storage consists of a 944 GB SSD, and the baseline network bandwidth is rated at 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is in the bottom 10% with a score of 954.09, and single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression are relatively weak. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 9532.02 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 59.76 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth is stable, reaching 683.87 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 56.56 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. Database operations are robust, with Redis SET operations achieving 10.88 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput reaching 9.91 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the inclusion of dual dedicated enterprise GPUs and local SSD storage within a 16-core configuration offers a balanced resource density for legacy GPU-accelerated workloads without the premium of newer-generation architectures. The trade-off is lower single-core CPU performance. This instance is best suited for workloads such as deep learning training, GPU-accelerated databases, parallel data processing, and scientific computing that can leverage multi-core execution and dedicated hardware acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 120.0 GB of system memory, a 944 GB local SSD, and two NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPUs providing 32 GB of total VRAM. While single-core CPU benchmarks show lower-tier performance, multi-core execution and memory bandwidth remain average, with stress-ng multi-core scoring 9532.02 and Redis SET operations reaching 10.88 million operations per second. The instance offers a cost-efficient profile for legacy GPU-accelerated workloads by bundling dedicated hardware accelerators and local SSD storage. It is highly suitable for parallel computing, deep learning, and database workloads that require dedicated GPU acceleration and local high-speed storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 16 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 120 GB RAM, two NVIDIA P100 GPUs with 32 GB VRAM, and a 944 GB local SSD for parallel computing workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.4xlarge features 16 Intel vCPUs, 120 GB RAM, dual NVIDIA P100 GPUs, and 944 GB local SSD storage for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A dual-GPU accelerated virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, local SSD storage, and balanced multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with two NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPUs providing 32 GB of total VRAM
Features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
Includes 120 GB of system memory and a 944 GB local SSD
Delivers 10.88 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks
Suited for deep learning, parallel data processing, and GPU-accelerated databases
